english translation text: Is baat se mehsoos karo kia hai Sakina (A.S)Realize who Sakina is with the fact that
Abbas (A.S) ke honton Ka Qaseeda hai Sakina (A.S)The lips of Abbas is praising Sakina
Aaina-e-Zehra (A.S) mein jo dekha tera bachpanIn the mirror of Zehra when we see your childhood
Har aks pukara ke tu Zehra hai Sakina(A.S)Every moment said that you are Zehra, Oh Sakina
Jo pyas ke parcham ki Alamdar hai ab tak He who is still the flag bearer of thirst
Abbas(A.S) ki woh pyari Sakina hai Sakina (A.S)Sakina is the beloved of Abbas
Abbas(A.S) ki Nazron se koi parh ke tau dekhayLook from Abbas's point of view
Ehsaas ki ek Nehj-e-Balagha hai Sakina(A.S)You will feel that Sakina is Nahjul Balagha
Jo Mashq mein bhar sakta hai dunya ke samandarHe who can fill the mashk with the oceans of the world
Kaunain mein bas woh tera saqqa hai Sakina(A.S)He is your water carrier, Oh Sakina

urdu transliteration text: Har Umr ke Haider ne jhulaya tera JhoolaEvery 'Haider' rocked your cradle

english translation text: Yeh auj faqat tu ne hi paya hai Sakina (A.S)Only you have attained this status, Oh Sakina
